necessityProof.blockerResolved: N1 still had five minimal read-only integration archive verification renderers with repeated markdown skeletons and repeated archive-reference line helpers.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N5 can treat these thinner minimal-integration renderers as Phase-B merge candidates, while the explicit target-result lines remain local to the one renderer that needs them.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The v2114 report builder and v2123 archive-reference helper cover this family. The gate-execution target result shape remains a local lines section because it is specific to read-only smoke targets.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The batch stops at five minimal read-only integration renderers. Shard readiness, runtime pass evidence, and fake transport remain separate because their helper shapes differ.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 5 minimal read-only integration archive verification test files --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real archive profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline and are outside this renderer-consolidation batch.

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2124 only changes Node markdown rendering for frozen minimal read-only integration archive profiles; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, or upstream service startup.
